name: OPNsense Firewall
description: OPNsense REST API for managing firewall filter rules, aliases, NAT, and network configuration on OPNsense firewalls

auth_config.note: Uses API key and secret pair via HTTP Basic Authentication (key as username, secret as password)

actions.name: List Firewall Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all firewall filter rules (automation rules by default, add show_all for all rules)

parameters.name: show_all
parameters.description: Show all rules including those from Firewall > Rules page

actions.name: Create Firewall Rule
actions.description: Create a new firewall automation filter rule

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Rule definition including enabled, action (pass/block/reject), interface, direction, protocol, source, destination

actions.name: Toggle Firewall Rule
actions.description: Enable or disable a specific firewall rule by UUID

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: UUID of the rule to toggle

actions.name: Delete Firewall Rule
actions.description: Delete a specific firewall rule by UUID

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: UUID of the rule to delete

actions.name: List Aliases
actions.description: Retrieve all firewall aliases (IP groups, port groups, etc.)

actions.name: Get Alias Content
actions.description: List the contents (IP addresses/entries) of a specific alias

parameters.name: alias_name
parameters.description: Name of the alias to list contents for

actions.name: Add IP to Alias
actions.description: Add an IP address to an existing alias (block list management)

parameters.name: alias_name
parameters.description: Name of the alias to add the address to

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: IP address or CIDR to add to the alias

actions.name: Remove IP from Alias
actions.description: Remove an IP address from an existing alias

parameters.name: alias_name
parameters.description: Name of the alias to remove the address from

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: IP address or CIDR to remove from the alias

actions.name: Apply Changes
actions.description: Apply pending firewall and alias changes (reconfigure)

actions.name: Reconfigure Aliases
actions.description: Apply pending alias changes after add/remove operations
